items.title: Elevated errors on Sonnet 4.6
items.snippet: [critical] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — We've had an incident between 08:23 PT / 15:23 UTC and 8:35 PT / 15:35 UTC. We have fully recovered.

items.title: Issues with responses using structured outputs on the API
items.snippet: [none] resolved — We have identified and resolved an issue which resulted in issues with model responses when making use of structured outputs via the Anthropic API between 16:10 UTC on April 22 and 01:59 UTC on April 23.
